title: Chore: Add rate limiting
original_text: Added rate limiting to API endpoints. Implemented token bucket algorithm. Added per-user rate limits. Added per-IP rate limits. Implemented rate limit headers. Added rate limit exceeded responses. Added rate limit monitoring. Result: rate limiting operational.
expected_subject: chore(api): add rate limiting to API endpoints
expected_body_lines: - Add per-user and per-IP rate limits
expected_command: git commit -m "chore(api): add rate limiting to API endpoints"
